---
title: "Day 5 — Consolidation & Future Directions"
subtitle: "Friday 19 June 2026"
---

*Finalizing deliverables: Ten Simple Rules are reviewed and agreed, vignettes are presented, and participants leave with clear post-workshop plans.*

## Schedule

| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 9:00–10:00 | **Plenary:** Finalize Ten Simple Rules · Presentations of vignettes and code examples |
| 10:00–10:30 | Morning break |
| 10:30–12:00 | Future tasks and responsibilities · Finalize action plans · Assign responsibilities · Closing celebration |
| 12:00–14:00 | Lunch |
| 14:00–15:30 | Optional activities |
| 15:30–16:00 | Afternoon break |
| 16:00–17:00 | Optional plenary / wrap-up |

---

## Materials

### Ten Simple Rules — Final Document

*Final version will be linked here after the workshop*

### Vignettes and Code Examples

*All vignettes presented on Day 5 will be posted on the [Vignettes](../vignettes/index.qmd) page*
